title: Taking Turns
lesson: Waiting and taking turns means everyone gets a chance to play.
prompts: In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, warm sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands waving a cheerful hello, with a happy, curious expression. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} wave back near the slide ladder, smiling. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, warm sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands, raising both hands in surprise, with a slightly surprised expression. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} crowd in close together, all of them reaching toward the slide ladder at once, eager to climb. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, warm sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands, with a calm, friendly smile, one hand raised gently as if suggesting everyone wait their turn. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} stand back from the slide ladder, listening and nodding. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, warm sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands, clapping with a cheerful, encouraging expression. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} slides down the red slide with arms up and a delighted grin, while {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} stands beside the slide cheering. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, warm sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits alone at the bottom of the slide having just slid down, beaming with a joyful smile. They are the only person in the frame. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, golden afternoon light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands, raising their joined hands high in celebration, with a big happy smile. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_BLACK} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06_RACE_WHITE} stand together laughing and playing happily, all three holding hands in a row. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
gists: At a sunny playground by a small red slide, the child waves hello while two friends, a girl and a boy, wave back near the slide ladder — the child arrives to play.
By the red slide, the child raises both hands in surprise as the two friends crowd in, all reaching for the slide ladder at once — it's too crowded, nobody can climb.
By the red slide, the child raises one hand calmly suggesting they wait their turn while the two friends stand back, listening and nodding.
By the red slide, the child claps and cheers as the girl slides down with arms up and the boy cheers beside the slide — a friend takes the first turn.
By the red slide, the child sits alone at the bottom of the slide having just slid down, beaming — it's the child's turn and they enjoy it.
By the red slide in golden light, the child and the two friends hold hands in a row, all happy — everyone got a turn and had fun.
texts: You came to the playground and saw a shiny red slide. Two friends were there too. "Let's play!" you said.
But everyone rushed to the ladder at once. It was too crowded, and nobody could climb.
"Let's take turns," you said gently, raising your hand. Your friends nodded and stepped back.
One friend slid down first — wheee! You clapped and cheered for her.
Then it was your turn. Down you zoomed to the bottom with a great big smile!
Everyone got a turn, and everyone had fun. You all held hands, as happy as can be.
